deleteCard.description: This item and its history will be permanently removed.

empty.title: No conversations yet
empty.description: Start a new conversation to delegate work to an agent.

search.emptyDescription: Try a different search or clear the current one.
search.historyErrorDescription: Some older mission text could not be loaded.

chatEmpty.heading: What can I help with?
chatEmpty.subheading: Tap a skill to get started, or just type what you need below.

suggestions.heading: What can your agent do?
suggestions.subheading: Pick a starting point based on what you have connected.
suggestions.subheadingEmpty: Connect a tool and your agent will know what to do.

connectCta.title: Connect a tool to get started
connectCta.description: Gmail, LinkedIn, Notion, Sheets, and more. Pick one to unlock starter prompts here.

findLeadsLinkedin.title: Find LinkedIn leads at a target company
findLeadsLinkedin.description: Pull contacts at a specific company with role filters.
findLeadsLinkedin.prompt: Find me 20 contacts at [company] in [role] roles. Return name, title, LinkedIn URL, and company in a table.

planMyDay.title: Plan my next working day
planMyDay.description: Read my inbox and calendar, surface what matters today.
planMyDay.prompt: Read my inbox and calendar for today and tomorrow. Build a focus list with replies I owe, meetings to prep, and anything urgent.

researchAccount.title: Research a target account
researchAccount.description: Pull recent news, signals, and key contacts from public sources.
researchAccount.prompt: Research [company name]. Surface recent news, leadership changes, funding, tech-stack signals, and 3 plausible reasons to reach out this week.

draftOutreach.title: Draft a cold outreach message
draftOutreach.description: Personalized first-touch email or LinkedIn message.
draftOutreach.prompt: Draft a short, friendly cold outreach email to [prospect name] at [company]. Mention one specific thing about their work and propose a 15-minute chat.

writeContent.title: Write a draft post or doc
writeContent.description: Long-form draft for a blog, LinkedIn post, or internal doc.
writeContent.prompt: Write a [LinkedIn post / blog draft / internal doc] about [topic]. Audience is [who]. Keep it concrete and human, no buzzwords.

analyzeSpreadsheet.title: Analyze a Google Sheet
analyzeSpreadsheet.description: Summarize trends, anomalies, or build a chart from a sheet.
analyzeSpreadsheet.prompt: Look at the Google Sheet at [URL]. Summarize the three most important trends and call out anything that looks off.

manageCrm.title: Update my CRM after a call
manageCrm.description: Log notes, next steps, and stage changes from a meeting recap.
manageCrm.prompt: I just had a call with [contact / company]. Here is what we discussed: [summary]. Update the CRM record with notes, next steps, and a suggested stage change. Show me the draft before applying.

summarizeCalls.title: Summarize this week's calls
summarizeCalls.description: Themes, asks, and action items across recent recordings.
summarizeCalls.prompt: Pull this week's call recordings and give me a recap: top themes, customer asks, blockers, and action items I owe.
